# Enhanced stitching: Handles custom commands beyond just exec

# Regular exec command
exec echo "test with exec"
stdout 'test with exec'

# Custom command that doesn't use exec
# (Note: These would fail if actually run, but show the concept)
# mcpdiff trace1.json trace2.json

# MCP tool commands
# mcp-spy -- mcpdiff file1 file2
# mcp-test -- go run ./test/main.go

# Server commands that start long-running processes
# mcp-server-start myserver go run ./cmd/server/main.go
# mcp-serve -- python mcp_server.py

# The enhanced stitcher parses ALL these command types:
# - exec commands (standard)
# - Custom MCP commands without exec
# - Server start commands
# - Nested commands with multiple --
# And creates complete call graph edges for all of them
